topic: one-step addition equation, word problem with population
latex: Belmont, Forkland, and Maplesville are three small towns in Alabama. Forkland has a population of 606 people, and Maplesville has a population of 705 people. The sum of the population of all three towns is 1,813 people. Solve $1{,}813 = b + (606 + 705)$. Interpret the solution.
